rules.rule_text:
rule Skalka
{
	meta:
		author = "MalBeacon"
		description = "Skalka system information file"
		reference = "https://github.com/MalBeacon/what-is-this-stealer"

	strings:
		$x1 = "Operation System:" ascii
		$x2 = "Current JarFile Path:" ascii
		$x3 = "Width:" ascii
		$x4 = "UserName" ascii
		$x5 = "Language & Country:" ascii

	condition:
		all of them
}
